phases.name: Domain: TripService notifies on remote load

steps.name: TripService.loadFromStorage notifies subscribers
steps.criteria: Given a TripService with a subscriber, when loadFromStorage is called after remote state is written to storage, then the subscriber is notified and trip state reflects the remote change; Given loadFromStorage loads state identical to current state, then no unnecessary notification fires
steps.scenario_name: Subscribers are notified when loadFromStorage updates state

phases.name: Wiring: Firestore trip storage in production + onChange handler

steps.name: AdapterFactories.createTripStorage accepts uid and options
steps.criteria: Given AdapterFactories type has createTripStorage accepting uid and optional onChange, when initializeApp is called with an authenticated user, then createTripStorage is called with the user's uid; Given legacy factories, when createTripStorage is called without uid, then AsyncStorage trip storage is returned

steps.name: Wire trip onChange handler for real-time sync
steps.criteria: Given initializeApp creates trip storage with an onChange callback, when a remote device checks off an item and the onChange fires, then TripService.loadFromStorage is called and the local trip reflects the checked state; Given a remote device adds an item and onChange fires, then the new item appears in the local trip; Given a UI subscriber is attached, when remote trip change arrives through onChange, then the subscriber is notified triggering a re-render
steps.scenario_name: Remote trip checkoff arrives via onChange and updates trip service state
